rgpdSectionIntro: For online stores, explicit customer consent before any WhatsApp message is mandatory. Use the text below in your checkout flow.
rgpdConsentBody: I agree to receive a one-off WhatsApp invitation from {establishment} via our partner REPUTEXA to share my review after receiving my parcel.
rgpdShopifyLi3: Check <bold>“Show a subscription opt-in at checkout”</bold>.
rgpdShopifyLi4: In <bold>“Subscription text”</bold>, paste the REPUTEXA text (copied above).
rgpdStripeLi1: In Stripe Dashboard open <bold>Checkout & Payment Links</bold>.
rgpdStripeLi4: Use the <bold>REPUTEXA consent text</bold> as the label (copied above).
rgpdClauseHeading: Clause for your Terms / Privacy policy
rgpdClauseInstruction: <bold>Instruction:</bold> copy the clause below into your terms and replace “Article [X]” with the correct number.
rgpdClauseBody: Article [X] – Review collection and customer satisfaction: To improve our services we use REPUTEXA to request reviews after your purchases. If you consented during checkout, your data (first name, phone number, order details) will be transmitted securely. REPUTEXA acts as a processor; data is used only for a single WhatsApp invitation and is never sold to third parties.
rgpdNoteBody: Adding this clause is required to meet your duty to inform customers. If you do not insert or actually apply it on your site and documents, compliance of your journey is your sole responsibility; without this implementation REPUTEXA cannot be held liable for any shortcomings related to information or consent.
certificateTip: Summary document for your records (customers, insurer or authority): published legal version in force, last Guardian cycle, account commitment — REPUTEXA timestamped trail.
